allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c "taskkill /IM node.exe /F & taskkill /IM python.exe /F & taskkill /IM scene-remix.exe /F")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add manual scene editing and configurable keyboard shortcuts

Scene editing features:
- Merge adjacent scenes \(M key or context menu\)
- Split scene at playhead \(S key or context menu\)
- Drag scene boundaries to adjust start/end times
- Full undo/redo support for all scene operations
- Backend validation to prevent overlapping scenes

Keyboard shortcuts:
- New Settings > Shortcuts tab to view all shortcuts
- Click-to-record UI for remapping shortcuts
- Reset individual or all shortcuts to defaults
- Shortcuts persist to localStorage

New files:
- sceneOperations.ts: Core merge/split/boundary logic
- SceneBoundaryHandle.vue: Draggable edge handles
- SceneContextMenu.vue: Right-click context menu
- KeyboardShortcutsSettings.vue: Settings panel
- scene-validation.ts: Backend validation service

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
